issues.summary: The deploy scripts have no set -e; a command failure outside er() may be overlooked
issues.recommendation: Add set -e at the start (after the shebang) and possibly set -o pipefail; for interactive blocks consider conditionally disabling it.

issues.summary: Duplicated logic: ask_continue, echo_dec, er(), check_create_network, check_stack_exists are repeated in prod_deploy, dev_deploy, test_deploy, git_prod_deploy
issues.recommendation: Extract the common functions into a scripts/common.sh file and load it in the deploy scripts via source.

issues.summary: restore_database.sh does not use set -e and does not validate the variables DBNAME, USED_DB_BACKUP, DB_FLAG_ROLE before destructive commands
issues.recommendation: Add set -e and, at the start, a check that the required env vars are set; on error exit with a clear message.

issues.summary: build_prod_image.sh has no error handling or documentation
issues.recommendation: Add set -e; optionally a short comment or -h with a description.

issues.summary: db_connection_from_docker-web.py does not read DB_PORT from the secret; the connection uses the default port 5432
issues.recommendation: Add db_port = data.get("DB_PORT", 5432) and pass port to psycopg2.connect().

issues.summary: clone_test_db.py does not verify the existence of /run/secrets/db_conf or the required keys in the JSON before use
issues.recommendation: At the start, check the existence of the file and the presence of the keys; on error sys.exit(1) with a description.

issues.summary: clone_test_db.py uses f-strings for SQL; the values come from the secret, the injection risk is low, but consistency with parameterization would be better
issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries (cursor.execute with %s and a tuple) where psycopg2 allows it for DDL.

config_notes.crontab.txt: Runs every minute: python3 manage.py runcrons "cron.notifications.Notifications" --settings=webclient.settings.production. Errors from runcrons are not handled in the crontab; it depends on logging in the application.
config_notes.uwsgi_site.ini: uWSGI configuration for production; it does not call the scripts from scripts/ directly, only the module webclient.wsgi.
